C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc libtitankv_lib.a CMakeFiles/titankv_lib.dir/internal/engine2_0/bloomfilter.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/titankv_lib.dir/internal/engine2_0/internal_key.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/titankv_lib.dir/internal/engine2_0/wal.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/titankv_lib.dir/internal/engine2_0/memtable.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/titankv_lib.dir/internal/engine2_0/sstable_builder.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/titankv_lib.dir/internal/engine2_0/sstable_reader.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/titankv_lib.dir/internal/engine2_0/sstable_iterator.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/titankv_lib.dir/internal/engine2_0/manifest.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/titankv_lib.dir/internal/engine2_0/db.cpp.obj
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ranlib.exe libtitankv_lib.a
